prompt: Serializing a User object throws NotSerializableException. What is the bug?
choices: User must declare a serialVersionUID field to be serializable
The Connection field is not Serializable — all non-transient fields must be Serializable or the class cannot be serialized
String is not Serializable and must be replaced with char[]
explanation: Java serialization requires every non-transient field to be Serializable. java.sql.Connection is a live network resource and is not Serializable. Fix: mark the field transient — transient Connection dbConn; — so the serialization engine skips it. After deserialization, the connection will be null and must be re-established.
